_meta.description: Scheduled/known incidents with an active window in match minutes. Live crowd-driven incidents are derived separately from critical zones. Minutes are match-clock: negative = pre-match ingress, 90+ = full-time egress.

scheduled.summary: Heat advisory during ingress. Hydration stations active on the North Plaza.
scheduled.protocol: Direct queuing spectators to shade and water; watch for heat distress in vulnerable spectators.

scheduled.summary: Unaccompanied minor reported near the Family Area.
scheduled.protocol: Follow safeguarding reunification protocol; escort to Family Services and log the report.

scheduled.summary: Spectator medical assistance requested in Section 128.
scheduled.protocol: Dispatch nearest first-aid team; keep a step-free path clear to Main First Aid for stretcher/wheelchair access.
